Name: Minimum Loading Levels
Description: Defines minimum number of loading levels required per system

Name: Single Level Back Bracing
Description: Requires back bracing for single level units
Validation: Back bracing must be installed for single level units

Name: Back Bracing Specification
Description: Defines back bracing requirements for single level units

Name: Back Bracing Placement
Description: Defines placement of back bracing
Formula: BackBracingPlacement = "At extreme ends and at pitch of 5"
Validation: Back bracing must be properly placed

Name: Maximum Unsupported Length
Description: Defines maximum allowable unsupported length
Validation: IF(USL > MaxUSL, "Invalid: Unsupported length exceeds maximum")

Group: Number of Units in a Row
Name: Minimum Units Per Row
Description: Defines minimum number of units required in a row

Name: Base Plate Selection - Single Unit, Single Level
Description: Defines base plate for single unit with single level

Name: Base Plate Selection - Single Unit, Multiple Levels
Description: Defines base plate for single unit with multiple levels

Name: Base Plate Selection - Multiple Units, Single Level
Description: Defines base plate for multiple units with single level

Name: Base Plate Selection - Multiple Units, Multiple Levels, Short USL
Description: Defines base plate for multiple units with multiple levels and short USL
Formula: IF(UnitsPerRow > 1 AND NumberOfLevels > 1 AND USL <= 1750, BasePlate = "2H - 2 bolts")

Name: Base Plate Selection - Multiple Units, Multiple Levels, Long USL
Description: Defines base plate for multiple units with multiple levels and long USL
Formula: IF(UnitsPerRow > 1 AND NumberOfLevels > 1 AND USL > 1750, BasePlate = "2H - 4 bolts")

Name: Back Bracing Requirement - Single Unit, Single Level
Description: Determines back bracing requirement for single unit with single level
Validation: Back bracing must be installed if required

Name: Back Bracing Requirement - Single Unit, Multiple Levels
Description: Determines back bracing requirement for single unit with multiple levels
Validation: Back bracing not required for this configuration

Name: Back Bracing Requirement - Multiple Units, Single Level
Description: Determines back bracing requirement for multiple units with single level
Validation: Back bracing must be installed if required

Name: Back Bracing Requirement - Multiple Units, Multiple Levels
Description: Determines back bracing requirement for multiple units with multiple levels
Validation: Back bracing not required for this configuration

Name: Height to Depth Ratio Calculation
Description: Calculates the height to depth ratio of the rack system

Name: Single-Sided Unit Depth
Description: Defines effective depth for single-sided units
Parameters: Effective depth must be calculated correctly for unit type

Name: Double-Sided Unit Depth
Description: Defines effective depth for double-sided units
Parameters: Effective depth must be calculated correctly for unit type

Name: Height Definition for Ratio
Description: Defines which height to use for ratio calculation
Parameters: Height used must be last loading level height from floor

Name: Row Connector Purpose
Description: Defines purpose of row connectors
Formula: RowConnectorPurpose = "Join racking frames back to back to form double-sided run"
Parameters: Row connectors must be used for double-sided configurations

Name: First Row Connector Position
Description: Defines position of first row connector
Parameters: First row connector must be at specified height

Name: Second Row Connector Position
Description: Defines position of second row connector
Parameters: Second row connector must be at specified height

Name: Intermediate Row Connector Spacing
Description: Defines spacing between intermediate row connectors
Parameters: Intermediate connectors must be at specified spacing

Name: Last Row Connector Position
Description: Defines position of last row connector
Parameters: Last row connector must be below last horizontal bracing and at specified distance from top

Name: Maximum Row Connector Spacing
Description: Defines maximum allowable spacing between row connectors
Parameters: IF(ActualRowConnectorSpacing > MaxRowConnectorSpacing, "Invalid: Row connector spacing exceeds maximum")

Name: Row Connector Proximity to Bracing Nodes
Description: Defines maximum distance from bracing nodes
Parameters: IF(ActualDistanceFromBracingNode > MaxDistanceFromBracingNode, "Invalid: Row connector too far from bracing node")

Name: Short Frame Row Connector Rule
Description: Defines row connector requirements for frames less than 4m
Parameters: Short frames must have two row connectors at specified positions

Name: X-Bracing Continuity Rule
Description: Ensures X-bracing continuity across multiple uprights
Formula: IF(UprightCount > 2 AND XBracingUsed = TRUE, XBracingContinuity = "Maintain 600mm pitch in consecutive uprights")
Parameters: X-bracing must maintain consistent pitch across consecutive uprights
